text:
Created attachment 179821
patch (svn diff) for devel/safe-iop

This pr updates devel/safe-iop with

 - a new MASTER_SITES - removes (now defunct) GOOGLE

 - adds me as MAINTAINER

Please find the svn(1) diff(1), devel_safe-iop.diff, attached.
For all the details.

That's it!

Thanks!

--Chris
